summary: Comprehensive testing completed for FinRomania 2.0 LIVE Data & Cache-Busting Fix. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend fully functional with proper cache headers, auto-refresh working at 10-second intervals, and all data displaying correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ Cache Headers - /api/global/overview returns no-store, no-cache headers
✅ Cache Headers - /api/stocks/bvb returns no-store, no-cache headers
✅ Cache Headers - /api/bvb/indices returns no-store, no-cache headers
✅ Cache Headers - /api/bvb/top-movers returns no-store, no-cache headers
✅ Cache Headers - /api/stocks/global returns no-store, no-cache headers
✅ Global Markets API - Returns 8 indices, 6 commodities, 5 crypto, 4 forex
✅ Global Markets API - Data sources verified (EODHD for indices, yfinance for crypto)
✅ Global Markets API - Sentiment calculation working correctly
✅ BVB Stocks API - Returns 20 BVB stocks with all required fields
✅ BVB Indices API - Returns 5 indices (BET, BETTR, BETFI, BETNG, BETXT)
✅ BVB Top Movers API - Returns gainers, losers, most_traded
✅ BVB Sectors API - Returns 9 sectors with performance data
✅ Ticker Bar API - /api/stocks/global returns data for ticker
✅ Ticker Bar API - /api/stocks/bvb returns data for ticker (top 5)
✅ Data Freshness - updated_at timestamp is recent (within 5 minutes)
✅ Data Freshness - Multiple requests return fresh data
✅ Health Endpoint - Returns healthy status
✅ Frontend - Global Markets page loads with heatmap, sentiment, indices
✅ Frontend - BVB Stocks page loads with Market Pulse, indices, heatmap
✅ Frontend - Ticker bar displays 22 items with live data
✅ Frontend - Auto-refresh working at 10-second intervals (confirmed via console logs)
critical_code_review_comments: Cache-busting implementation is correct with timestamp query params and no-store headers
Auto-refresh intervals are appropriate: 10s for ticker, 10s for global markets, 15-60s for BVB based on subscription
Data sources properly configured: EODHD for real-time US indices, yfinance for crypto/commodities
seed_data_creation: None required - using real EODHD API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: LIVE data fix has been verified. Cache headers are correctly set to no-store/no-cache. Auto-refresh is working at 10-second intervals for ticker bar and global markets. BVB data refreshes at 60s for free users, 15s for PRO. All APIs return fresh data with proper timestamps.

cache_busting.no_store_headers: ✅ All live data APIs return Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache
cache_busting.pragma_no_cache: ✅ All live data APIs return Pragma: no-cache
